feature.description: Dev Container Feature OCI ref, pinned by @sha256 digest. NO :tag is permitted alongside the digest — the Dev Containers CLI's path-validation regex rejects 'name:tag@sha256:...'; use 'name@sha256:...' alone.

post_create_hint.description: Bash snippet appended to postCreate.sh when this stack is detected.

firewall_allowlist.description: Hostnames added to EXTRA_HOSTS when this stack is detected.
